'''Skoth''' was a dried-up riverbed and settlement on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Prakith/Legends|Prakith]], and was the source for a number of valuable [[Ore/Legends|ores]]. [[Prall (company)|Prall]], a mining company controlled by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Foga Brill/Legends|Foga Brill]], oversaw much of the riverbed excavation.
